zh.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Livermore於1633年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼時，她的父親John Livermore Sr.27歲，母親Grace Sherman18歲。她於1655年2月14日與John Coolidge II在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1678年12月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年45歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃特托笛卡爾 波英 普拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Livermore于1633年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼时，她的父亲John Livermore Sr.27岁，母亲Grace Sherman18岁。她于1655年2月14日与John Coolidge II在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1678年12月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年45岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃特托笛卡爾 波英 普拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Livermore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from Livermere in Suffolk. This is first found in the form Leuuremer (c. 1050), which suggests derivation from Old English lǣfer ‘rush, reed’ + mere ‘lake’. However, later forms consistently show i in the first syllable, suggesting Old English lifer ‘liver’, referring either to the shape of the pond or to the coagulation of the water.

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Livermore was born in 1633, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Livermore Sr., was 27 and her mother, Grace Sherman, was 18. She married John Coolidge II on 14 February 1655, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 23 December 1678, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 45, and was buried in Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Livermore est née en 1633, à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Livermore Sr., avait 27 ans et sa mère, Grace Sherman, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé John Coolidge II le 14 février 1655, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 décembre 1678, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hannah Livermore 1633 in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Livermore Sr. 27 und ihre Mutter Grace Sherman 18. Sie hat am 14. Februar 1655 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America John Coolidge II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Dezember 1678 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

Lei sposato John Coolidge II il 14 febbraio 1655, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 8 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Livermoreが1633年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーで生まれた時，父John Livermore Sr.は27歳，母Grace Shermanは18歳であった。1655年2月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンでJohn Coolidge IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1678年12月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで45歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスワテルトウンオルド ブリイング プレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Livermore(이)가 1633년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Livermore Sr.(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Grace Sherman(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1655년 2월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 John Coolidge II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1678년 12월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 왓르타운 드 버이잉 플레이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Livermore nasceu em 1633, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Livermore Sr., tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Grace Sherman, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com John Coolidge II em 14 de fevereiro de 1655, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de dezembro de 1678, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Livermore родилась в 1633 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Livermore Sr. было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace Sherman, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Coolidge II 14 февраля 1655 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 23 декабря 1678 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности олд буринг плеис, вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hannah Livermore nació en 1633, en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John Livermore Sr., tenía 27 años y su mamá, Grace Sherman, tenía 18 años. Se casó con John Coolidge II el 14 de febrero de 1655, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 23 de diciembre de 1678, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
